meaning: n.神学院,学校,学院,发源地
examples: Washington University in Saint Louis was named Eliot Seminary when it opened in eighteen fifty-three.
After entering the minor seminary, he learnt to play organ and served as resident organist until his final graduation.
Since R. Albert Mohler became the President of Southern Seminary, there has been a revival of the Calvinism of the Abstract of Principles.
Christ was not, Himself, a seminary graduate, nor did He establish an institution of higher learning.
His degrees are from tiny Ouachita Baptist University and the Southwestern Baptist Theological Seminary.
